name: Monday all-clients weekly review
prompt: Read client-index.json. For each active client workspace under ~/.houston/workspaces/, pull last 7 days of outputs.json + shared-ledger.jsonl + kpi-snapshots/. Compose a per-client section + a PP-wide rollup. Email Caner. iMessage one-line summary.

name: Daily Caner morning brief (PP)
prompt: Read overnight PP outputs (sales pipeline movement, content drafts ready, client at-risk flags). Compose 3 wins / 3 risks / 3 recommended actions. iMessage Caner.

name: Daily alerts sweep across ALL workspaces
description: Daily alerts sweep across ALL workspaces
prompt: Iterate ~/.houston/workspaces/*/alerts.jsonl. For any P1 opened in last 24h not yet acked, iMessage Caner with brand + alert + proposed action. Append sweep to ../shared-ledger.jsonl.

name: Friday PP audit + level-up
prompt: Run audit skill across PP workspace + every active client workspace. Run level-up on the top gap PP-side (sales, content, ops, finance). iMessage Caner.

name: Monday onboarding pipeline check
prompt: Use /skill client-onboarding. Read PP CRM (pp-crm-psi.vercel.app/contacts) for any deals in "Closed-won" not yet onboarded. Propose: spin up new PPAIOS workspace, run kickoff routine, generate proposal SOW.
